title: Amber rules on near-black stone: what is inscribed in warm gold cannot be in error; what is not inscribed does not exist. The warm palette communicates authority and permanence rather than cold precision — the .precept file as ancient immutable law, not a technical document.
conceptualBridge: The amber tablet means Precept rules are durable law because only what is inscribed in the definition is allowed to exist.
decision: Shortlisted as a warmer variant of the law-tablet family with strong permanence cues.
